mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_conversation (title, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.delete: UPDATE chat_conversation SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
